candidates.why: Explicit operating amortization line for the COGS/COR bucket appears separately alongside the selected 'Production costs' row, indicating it should be added separately rather than assumed embedded in the selected row.
This amortization line belongs to SG&A, not COGS, so it should not be mapped to COGS_DA.

variables.notes: Selected the separate COGS-related amortization row because it is presented as its own operating line item adjacent to, not clearly nested within, the selected COGS bucket 'Production costs'.

candidates.why: Explicit operating amortization line for the SG&A bucket appears separately alongside the selected 'Sales and administrative expenses' row, so it should be added separately later.
This amortization line belongs to COGS/COR rather than SG&A, so it should not be mapped to XSGA_DA.

variables.notes: No separate R&D expense row was selected in XRD, and the only relevant SG&A-related D&A row visible above the financial section is 'Amortization in SGA', which appears separate from the selected SG&A parent row.
